headline: BNY Mellon (BK) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Referring to page two of the quarterly update presentation, The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation has started the year with a strong performance in the first quarter.  Record revenue of $5.4 billion was up 13% year over year, reflecting broad-based growth across our Securities Services and Markets and Wealth Services businesses.  The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation’s position at the heart of global financial markets, with platforms across custody, security settlement, collateral, payments, trading, wealth, investments, and more, supports durable financial performance for our company, enabling us to power our clients' growth as they navigate an increasingly complex landscape.

headline: BNY (NYSE:BK) Delivers Impressive Q1 CY2026
summary: Global financial services company BNY NYSE:BK) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 13.8% year on year to $5.41 billion. Its GAAP profit of $2.24 per share was 16.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
